summary: Frontend-only testing of staff communications page at /admin/messages/staff. All 10 test cases passed: login as admin, verified 'Чат персонала' button removed from sidebar, navigated to /admin/messages/staff, verified page title 'Коммуникации персонала', verified three tabs (Общий чат, Личные сообщения, Обсуждение споров), verified online staff list, verified messages with role colors, verified staff list in Direct Messages tab, verified role legend, and sent test message in general chat.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminMessagesToStaff component correctly implements three tabs: General Chat, Direct Messages, Dispute Discussion
Role colors implemented per specification: Admin/Owner=Red #EF4444, Moderators=Yellow #F59E0B, Support=Blue #3B82F6
Old 'Чат персонала' button and StaffChatModal have been completely removed from codebase
General chat uses /msg/staff/general API with fallback to /admin/staff-chat
Role legend correctly shows at bottom: Админ/Владелец (red), Модератор (yellow), Поддержка (blue)
Minor: Console warning about unique 'key' prop in AdminMessagesToStaff - should add key to mapped elements
context_for_next_testing_agent: Staff communications page at /admin/messages/staff is fully functional. Three tabs work correctly: General Chat (shows online staff, messages with role colors), Direct Messages (shows staff list with role colors), Dispute Discussion (shows disputes list). Role legend at bottom shows correct colors. Old 'Чат персонала' sidebar button has been removed.

1_login_as_admin.details: Login with admin/000000 at /auth page successful, redirected to /admin

2_chat_personala_removed.details: 'Чат персонала' button has been removed from sidebar. No references found in codebase.

5_three_tabs_present.details: Three tabs present: 'Общий чат' (data-testid='tab-general'), 'Личные сообщения' (data-testid='tab-direct'), 'Обсуждение споров' (data-testid='tab-disputes')

6_online_staff_list.details: Online staff list shown in General Chat tab with 'Онлайн (1)' header showing admin user

7_messages_with_role_colors.details: Messages displayed with correct role colors - blue for support messages, purple for admin's own messages

8_direct_messages_staff_list.details: Staff list shown in Direct Messages tab: mod_p2p (Модератор P2P - yellow), mod_market (Гарант - yellow), support (Поддержка - blue)

9_role_legend.details: Role legend at bottom shows: 'Админ/Владелец' (red dot), 'Модератор' (yellow dot), 'Поддержка' (blue dot)

10_send_test_message.details: Test message sent successfully in general chat using message input (data-testid='staff-message-input') and send button (data-testid='staff-send-btn')

api_endpoints_used: POST /msg/staff/general - Send message to general chat
